title: Hiring Medical Officer at Jupiter Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Jupiter Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!
